name: @cucumber/messages
usage_summary: Declared as a devDependency in packages/features/package.json at version 30.1.0, but there are zero direct imports or requires of '@cucumber/messages' or '@cucumber/messages/' anywhere in packages/. It is a peer dependency of @cucumber/cucumber and @cucumber/pretty-formatter — its presence in package.json pins the version to satisfy those peers, but the project code itself never imports it directly.
how_to_remove: Remove the explicit '@cucumber/messages': '30.1.0' entry from packages/features/package.json. The version will then be resolved transitively through @cucumber/cucumber. If the peer version requirement is already satisfied by @cucumber/cucumber's own dependency tree, the explicit pin is unnecessary. Verify compatibility with pnpm after removal.
replacement_reason: Not directly imported anywhere in source code. The explicit pin in package.json exists only to satisfy peer dependency resolution. Removing the explicit declaration and relying on the transitive resolution from @cucumber/cucumber is safe and reduces direct dependency surface.
